programme.title: All American
programme.desc: Spencer faces a decision that could transform his reputation, Billy realizes he needs to make major changes, and Grace and Corey have a tough conversation about their family.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a good lead. The home is dirty and dated, with a large fireplace in the center that will cost a fortune to update.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of London: The New R
programme.desc: Amanda, Juliet Mayhew, and Nessie all find themselves in the hot seat.

programme.title: Crikey! It's The Irwins
programme.desc: After historical wildfires strike Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri help the severely injured koala population.

programme.title: Beach Hunters
programme.desc: A water-loving couple wants a family-orientated beach home in a quiet neighbourhood near an uncrowded beach in Norfolk, Virginia. S6 E1.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: After moving 42 times, an attorney is settling in Long Beach, NY. She wants a place with an updated kitchen to share with her mum and adult son. S18 E7.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Canadian family takes a life-changing job opportunity and relocates to The Hague, Netherlands. S173 E2.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple looks to buy a home in Puerto Vallarta to avoid harsh Canadian winters. With a surging market, have they waited too long?

programme.title: ThreeNews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat AU
programme.desc: With life changing cash on the line, everyday Aussies will have the opportunity to walk away with cash prizes up to $1,000,000.

programme.title: 7 Days
programme.desc: NZ's longest running comedy show is back for its 18th season of absolute hilarity. Hosted by Jeremy Corbett. Guests: Jimmy McGhie, He Huang, Felicity Ward, Paul Ego, Hayley Sproull, Rhys Mathewson.

programme.title: Best Foods Comedy Gala 2026
programme.desc: Join host Dai Henwood and an all-star lineup of international and local acts for the Best Foods Comedy Gala, the showstopper event that kicks off the Comedy Festival.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham's guests are superstar actor and singer Cher, actor Michael Fassbender, double Oscar nominee Keira Knightley and Hollywood star Josh Brolin. With music from Jalen Ngonda.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of London: The New R
programme.desc: Amanda, Juliet Mayhew, and Nessie all find themselves in the hot seat.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Carlo's team takes a cake order for delivery to all the way to Saudi Arabia. Back home a fight is brewing over the bakery's signature pastry.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: For the first time since blasting Kilcher Road, Eivin tries to haul a huge pole barn to his homestead. Jewel and her son visit, and August builds a unique outhouse. S9 E10.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: In Tennessee's Smoky Mountains a family's homestead is failing because they choose to live on the useless side of their land attached to power.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Shaun Murphy makes a personal connection with a precocious young patient which threatens his objectivity. telemedicine services for nursing homes and care facilities.

programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: With Christmas approaching Aria, Emily, Hanna and Spencer look to clear Spencer's name. Alison gets a glimpse at the past, present and future by a ghostly presence.

programme.title: All American
programme.desc: Spencer is taken aback to learn who his dad has added to the team, and Jordan faces repercussions for his actions. Plus, Layla gets mad at Spencer, and Coop has found her voice.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek gets a lead on a house that needs more work than they'd hoped. Meanwhile, Christina struggles to tell Tarek she wants to sell the house they lived in. S7 E12.

programme.title: Killer Grannies
programme.desc: Respected fire captain vanishes on a fishing trip. Nearly two years later, a tip uncovers manipulation and a grandmother whose wishing well hides dark secrets.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Island
programme.desc: Secrets are threatened as the remaining 12 players vie for influence; a challenge winner makes a divisive split decision.

programme.title: Beach Hunters
programme.desc: A couple that both grew up visiting Cape Cod in the summer wants a traditional New England-style home of their own for their growing family. S6 E2.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: An assistant principal and a teacher are moving to the seaside town of Long Beach, NY. They want to find a home close to the beach. S18 E8.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A young, married couple relocates for a military assignment to low-key Milton Keynes, England. S173 E3.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After years of nannying for wealthy families, an Australian woman looks to use her life savings to buy a beachfront home in Vanuatu.

programme.title: ThreeNews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat AU
programme.desc: With life changing cash on the line, everyday Aussies will have the opportunity to walk away with cash prizes up to $1,000,000.

programme.title: The 1 Percent Club UK
programme.desc: Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: Game Of 2 Halves
programme.desc: Game of 2 Halves pairs stars of the sporting stadiums with crack-up Kiwi comedians in a battle of banter and a test of trivia. Guests: Josh Thomson, Chris Key, Mark Richardson & more!

programme.title: 7 Days
programme.desc: NZ's longest running comedy show is back for its 18th season of absolute hilarity. Hosted by Jeremy Corbett. Guests: Jimmy McGhie, He Huang, Felicity Ward, Paul Ego, Hayley Sproull, Rhys Mathewson.

programme.title: Killer Grannies
programme.desc: Respected fire captain vanishes on a fishing trip. Nearly two years later, a tip uncovers manipulation and a grandmother whose wishing well hides dark secrets.

programme.title: 9-1-1: Lone Star
programme.desc: Captain Strand and the 126 help a husband whose wife `dies' when she is not upside-down; Grace takes a call from a pizza delivery driver who is In for the shock of his life.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: The four competing chefs start the day strong with a hearty breakfast. Then, they cook up their best happy hour dishes followed by a sweet and spicy showstopper.

programme.title: The Aquarium
programme.desc: The staff use laser-equipped cameras to determine just how long Trixie the whale shark is. Plus, a shy box turtle makes friends.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David helps a pair of siblings find a dream home in Palm Springs, California. They're looking for desert home with a mountain view and space to paint.

programme.title: Summer Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer celebrates Warner Bros. Pictures' movie event, Barbie! He challenges the bakers to make desserts inspired by Barbie's signature colour, pink!

programme.title: Summer Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the three finalists to make amusement park treats. Then, the bakers serve sparkler-studded 4th of July parade float cakes for the title!

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Icon Snoop Dogg wants to recognize the impact the commissioner of his football league, Commish, has had on the kids in his community. S2 E14.
